name: crossenv
description: Credential theft IoC — malicious npm package that mimicked cross-env but stole environment variables and SSH keys via postinstall script. Tests: L2-POST-001 (postinstall + preinstall scripts), L2-CRED-001 (credential exfiltration via curl), L2-OBFS-001 (obfuscated payload URL).

expected_findings.L2-POST-001: postinstall and preinstall scripts that execute arbitrary code
expected_findings.L2-CRED-001: preinstall script uses curl to download and execute remote payload — potential credential theft
expected_findings.L2-PROV-001: No repository field — provenance cannot be verified
